name: spce-workflow
description: Spec-first workflows with Kiro-compatible indexes, requirements analysis, task graphs, resumable progress, MCP task and acceptance updates, hook guards, and bounded layered acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Clarify, route, implement, and accept complex coding work through approved specs.
interface.longDescription: Spce workflow adds intake-first clarification, Kiro-style requirements analysis, spec.yml/progress.md state files, structured task graphs, MCP-backed task and acceptance updates, hook guard templates, controlled implementation, local pre-acceptance, and strict resumable final acceptance with review/adversarial agents, isolated acceptance fixes, and bounded retry policy before reporting completion.
defaultPrompt: Clarify this request before writing the spec.
Create a spec before implementing this feature.
Plan this design-first change before coding.
Write a bugfix spec for this regression.
Run final acceptance for this completed spec workflow.
Resume this interrupted spec workflow from docs/specs/progress.md.
